name: SOPS Secret Manager
description: Installs Mozilla SOPS with age key generation for encrypting secrets in devcontainer projects

generateAgeKey.description: Generate an age key pair for the devcontainer user

cloudKms.description: Cloud KMS provider for SOPS: aws, gcp, azure, or empty for age-only

configureGitFilter.description: Configure git filters for transparent SOPS encryption/decryption
